title: matelea tlilxochitli
intro: Matelea tlilxochitli, also known as the "Flower of the Dead," is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Matelea tlilxochitli include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. Traditional herbal preparations of Matelea tlilxochitli include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects.
